title: What Should An AI Device Look Like? — With Alex Himel
summary: Alex Himel, Meta's VP of Wearables, discusses smart glasses as the next major computing platform, positioning them as suitable for AI assistants to help with daily tasks and real-world context awareness. The conversation covers competition from OpenAI, Google, Apple, and Amazon; on-device AI; privacy concerns around facial recognition; and Meta's vision of glasses-based personal AI.
